rootCause: Validation did first-use bind for null HWID, but response/debug payload did not expose hwidBoundNow/incoming HWID and app wording could still make non-HWID failures look like device binding problems. Trial cooldown also blocked users with old failed/expired trial history.
backendFix: First-use HWID validation now reports hwidBoundNow, incomingHwid, hwidUnbound, exact reason messages, and admin dry-run visibility.
appFix: Desktop app cloud message mapping now says disabled and HWID mismatch reasons precisely; admin debug includes incoming/unbound/boundNow fields.
firstUseBindingFixed: source fixed; local DB E2E not run because DATABASE_URL/backup blocker remains
errorMessages: license_not_found, expired/trial_expired, disabled, hwid_mismatch and trial_already_claimed are distinct in backend/app copy
